name: GOLFTEC Rhode Island
address: 10 Worthington Rd Unit B, Cranston, RI 02920
about: GOLFTEC Rhode Island is a golf training and fitting center focused on data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. The facility offers personalized golf lessons, club fitting services, and practice memberships designed to improve swing mechanics and on-course performance. Services include one-time swing evaluations, comprehensive lesson plans with a one-time pause option, and custom club fittings that use launch monitors and shaft optimization to match equipment to individual player needs. Booking is handled online, and appointments canceled within 24 hours or missed are subject to a fee.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and video analysis
Custom club fitting services with a focus on optimizing equipment
One-time pause option available for lesson packages
Access to training bays with advanced technology and practice memberships

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for launch monitor data during lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings. Their club fitting service helps match you with the best equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided on bringing outside food or drinks, as there are no on-site food or beverage services mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulation is not specified in the content.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the content mentions junior-specific programs, indicating the facility is equipped to provide lessons and fitting services for youth golfers.
